chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 30 of 2009 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For regular hearing. 23.11.2016. None present. -.-.-. For the past couple of hearings the order sheets reflect that none is present on behalf of applicant. Today no one is present on behalf of applicant nor there is any intimation from applicant’s side for such absence. It is now 12:10 p.m and consequently, instant Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ali Haider
